## Conceitos-Chave de Jordan Lee

### Frameworks Principais
- **People-Process-Management** — Todo problema de negocio cai em uma dessas categorias
- **Do, Document, Delegate** — Sequencia para escalar qualquer processo
- **Competency > Experience** — Preferir jovens com potencial a veteranos com vicios
- **Sink or Swim** — Zero hand-holding, performance ou saida
- **Play to Win** — Modo ofensivo vs modo defensivo
- **Growth Partner Model** — Fee + retainer + revenue share

### Filosofia Central
> "Urgency = Success. Os melhores resolvem agora, nao amanha."
> "If you're 40 and not rich, you either worked on the wrong thing or you're just shit."
> "CEOs are unreasonable people. You are being too reasonable."

### Metricas-Chave
- Revenue: $4-6M/mes
- Closers: 70
- Calls/dia: 300
- Top closer: $45-50k/mes
- Ad spend: $1.5M/mes (Facebook)
- Margem liquida: 70-80%
